task_completion.description: Open the Unmatched Case-Control tool in Epi Info 7 StatCalc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 StatCalc window is open and the 'Unmatched Case-Control Study' module is displayed.

task_completion.description: Enter the required study parameters into the StatCalc tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields in the StatCalc window show: Two-sided confidence level = 95%, Power = 80%, Ratio of controls to cases = 3, Percent of controls exposed = 15%, and Odds ratio = 2.0.

task_completion.description: Create a text file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open or a file explorer shows a file named 'casecontrol_samplesize_report.txt' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: List the study parameters and the results for all three calculation methods in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the entered parameters and the calculated sample sizes (Cases, Controls, and Total) for Kelsey, Fleiss with Continuity Correction, and Fleiss without Continuity Correction.

task_completion.description: Include a one-sentence recommendation to use the Fleiss with Continuity Correction method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a sentence explicitly recommending 'Fleiss with Continuity Correction' and stating it is because it is the most conservative method.

integrity.description: The agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to calculate the sample size rather than relying on external scripts or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Epi Info 7 StatCalc application open with the calculated results visible on screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type pre-computed answers into the text file without performing the calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a chronological progression in the screenshots showing the agent opening StatCalc, entering the parameters, viewing the results, and then transferring those specific results to the text file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OS to create and save the text file properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like Notepad) being used to write the report and a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer confirming the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\casecontrol_samplesize_report.txt'.
